name: @kalamdb/consumer
description: Topic consumer and agent runtime package for KalamDB
author: KalamDB Team

scripts.build:wasm: node -e "const {execSync,spawnSync}=require('child_process');process.chdir('../../..');const env={...process.env,CARGO_ENCODED_RUSTFLAGS:'',RUSTFLAGS:'',RUSTC_WRAPPER:'',CARGO_BUILD_RUSTC_WRAPPER:'',CARGO_TARGET_DIR:'sdks/typescript/consumer/.wasm-target',CARGO_HOME:'sdks/typescript/consumer/.wasm-cargo-home'};execSync('wasm-pack build kalam-consumer-wasm --target web --out-dir ../sdks/typescript/consumer/wasm --out-name kalam_consumer --no-opt --profile release-dist',{stdio:'inherit',env});const wasmPath='sdks/typescript/consumer/wasm/kalam_consumer_bg.wasm';const opt=spawnSync('wasm-opt',['-Oz','--all-features','--strip-debug','--strip-dwarf','-o',wasmPath,wasmPath],{stdio:'inherit',env});if(opt.error&&opt.error.code==='ENOENT'){console.warn('wasm-opt not found; skipping post-build size optimization')}else if(opt.status!==0){process.exit(opt.status||1)}"
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:link && npm run build:wasm && npm run build:prepare-wasm-dts && npm run build:ts && npm run build:copy-wasm
scripts.test: npm run build && NO_SERVER=true node --test tests/consumer-client.test.mjs tests/agent-runtime.test.mjs tests/readme-examples.test.mjs tests/wasm.test.mjs
